title: We've Forgotten More Than We Ever Knew
original_title: We've Forgotten More Than We Ever Knew
overview: A Man and a Woman wander through a hostile wilderness in a far-away world. One day, they stumble upon a mysterious set of Structures, which will complicate their lives both for good and ill.
